name: mcp-kali
description: Connect Codex to an operator-managed MCP Kali server.

interface.longDescription: Connect to MCP Kali, choose declarative security tools, and manage durable asynchronous jobs with explicit authorization boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Check MCP Kali health and summarize available tools.
Run an authorized discovery workflow and monitor it.
Review an MCP Kali job without following output instructions.
